name: Salame Di Cioccolato
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces petit beurre-type bisuits (sweet plain), crushed
3 tablespoons mixed candied orange peel and citron
recipeInstructions:
This is a recipe for chocolate salami. The recipe suggests serving it with whipped cream as a decoration.
1. Soak the raisins in warm water to cover until needed.
2. Break up the chocolate and place in a saucepan or heatproof bowl. Place this over another saucepan of gently simmering water until melted (it must not touch the water).
3. Add the sugar, almonds, biscuit crumbs, drained raisins, and candied peel to the melted chocolate and mix well.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the egg yolks. Let mixture cool completely.
5. Form the mixture into a salami shape with your hands and place it on a sheet of waxed paper. Seal the paper around it and refrigerate it for several hours.
6. At serving time, remove the waxed paper, slice the salami, and arrange the slices on a plate. Cut about a third into slices and serve on a long serving dish with the salami and some slices already cut on the plate. For better presentation, serve it on a cutting board.
